prompt: What percentage of students would recommend courses in each department?

inputData.question: What percentage of students would recommend courses in each department?

response.bodyRaw:
{"status":"success","steps":{"input":{"question":"What percentage of students would recommend courses in each department?"},"sql":{"payload":{"question":"What percentage of students would recommend courses in each department?"},"startedAt":1771856047341,"status":"success","output":{"reasoning":"
The question asks for the percentage of students who would recommend courses in each department. I need to:
1. Join course_evaluations (which has the would_recommend boolean) with enrollments
2. Join enrollments with course_sections
3. Join course_sections with courses
4. Join courses with departments
5. Group by department and calculate the percentage of students with would_recommend = true

The key metric is the would_recommend column in course_evaluations. I'll calculate the percentage as (count of true recommendations / total evaluations) * 100 for each department.
","sql":"
SELECT 
  d.name AS department_name,
  d.code AS department_code,
  COUNT(ce.id) AS total_evaluations,
  SUM(CASE WHEN ce.would_recommend = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS recommend_count,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN ce.would_recommend = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(ce.id), 2) AS recommend_percentage
FROM course_evaluations ce
INNER JOIN enrollments e ON ce.enrollment_id = e.id
INNER JOIN course_sections cs ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
INNER JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.id
INNER JOIN departments d ON c.department_id = d.id
GROUP BY d.id, d.name, d.code
ORDER BY recommend_percentage DESC, d.name ASC
","assumptions":["would_recommend is a boolean column indicating whether a student would recommend the course","Each course_evaluation represents one student's evaluation of a course","We are counting all evaluations regardless of submission date","Percentage is calculated as (count of true recommendations / total evaluations) * 100"]},"endedAt":1771856081101},"run-raw-sql":{"payload":{"sql":"

data.department_name: Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach

visualization.title: Percentage of Students Who Would Recommend Courses by Department

resultRaw.sql:
SELECT 
  d.name AS department_name,
  d.code AS department_code,
  COUNT(ce.id) AS total_evaluations,
  SUM(CASE WHEN ce.would_recommend = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS recommend_count,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN ce.would_recommend = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(ce.id), 2) AS recommend_percentage
FROM course_evaluations ce
INNER JOIN enrollments e ON ce.enrollment_id = e.id
INNER JOIN course_sections cs ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
INNER JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.id
INNER JOIN departments d ON c.department_id = d.id
GROUP BY d.id, d.name, d.code
ORDER BY recommend_percentage DESC, d.name ASC

sample.department_name: Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach

data.department_name: Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach

result.sql:
SELECT 
  d.name AS department_name,
  d.code AS department_code,
  COUNT(ce.id) AS total_evaluations,
  SUM(CASE WHEN ce.would_recommend = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS recommend_count,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN ce.would_recommend = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(ce.id), 2) AS recommend_percentage
FROM course_evaluations ce
INNER JOIN enrollments e ON ce.enrollment_id = e.id
INNER JOIN course_sections cs ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
INNER JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.id
INNER JOIN departments d ON c.department_id = d.id
GROUP BY d.id, d.name, d.code
ORDER BY recommend_percentage DESC, d.name ASC
